title: UBank $30 for Signing Up — Use 7JKDWG6
author: Navees
summary: Free $30 from UBank for making three card purchases in 30 days. Use code 7JKDWG6. Easy money.
body_html:
Right now UBank gives you $30 just for making three card purchases within 30 days of opening your new account. Sign up using: 7JKDWG6.

Open a new UBank account, make three purchases on your UBank Visa Debit card within 30 days, and UBank drops $30 into your account. That's it.

UBank is also offering high savings interest when you just deposit $200 every month — one of the simplest accounts to actually qualify for, no hoops.

So why not grab the $30 for three purchases? Great way to try UBank and see what they offer. Once you get the $30 you can always withdraw everything and/or close the account.

Both of us score $30 when you sign up with code 7JKDWG6 and make 3 purchases. Grab the UBank app + T&Cs here: ubank.com.au/refer-a-friend-invitees

Note: promo terms and rates change — check the current offer before signing up.
